_note: Effective $/token rates for workhorse models, derived from a live calibration probe (scripts/baseline-rig/calibrate.mjs). Gateway /key/info.spend is async/batched (settles in ~2-7s), so these rates give a fast per-call ESTIMATE; the campaign reconciles the grand total against the settled cumulative spend and rescales the per-model split to sum exactly. Reasoning tokens are billed inside completion_tokens, so perTotalToken already includes the reasoning tax.

cliTax.note: fresh claude -p (effort low) overhead; CLI usage.input/output EXCLUDE cache tokens, so recorded B tokens are lean; B1 cost = total_cost_usd (incl tax), B2 cost = apiRates on recorded tokens
